title: Who Will Replace Keir Starmer as UK Prime Minister? Here’s What Happens Next.
summary_full: Keir Starmer, the British prime minister, could be replaced through a full leadership contest. But if the top contender, Andy Burnham, is the only candidate, the process will be much faster.
summary_public: Keir Starmer, the British prime minister, could be replaced through a full leadership contest. But if the top contender, Andy Burnham, is the only candidate, the process will be much faster.
